action: Materialize a deterministic continuity-owned current view from the canonical queue snapshot and append-only updates.
created_from_handoff: M-003 identified the absence of a retained deterministic current-view artifact.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository files, public commit metadata, and public queue-update metadata were used.
next_action: Implement a repository-tree enumerator and validator that proves replay completeness and fails closed on duplicate IDs, invalid ownership, or ambiguous ordering.
